_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Grampian Annual Report 2019/20. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2019/20?
queries.expected_answer: Expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2019/20 was £433,160,000

queries.question: What was the total operating expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2019/20?
What percentage of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours at NHS Grampian in 2019/20?
queries.expected_answer: 91.7% of patients waited no more than 4 hours in A&E for the year ending March 2020

queries.question: Who was the Chair of NHS Grampian in 2020?
What was NHS Grampian's efficiency savings or cost improvement target for 2019/20?
queries.expected_answer: NHS Grampian's efficiency savings or cost improvement target for 2019/20 was £10.7 million for the year on NHS Grampian directly managed services.
